title: MTR: Over And Out
description: MTR: Over And Out is a modpack designed for the use of addons to the MTR mod. This uses MTR 4.0.0 which is in beta and NOT 3.2.2
body:
# **MTR: Over And Out** ### **Raise Yourself** **MTR: Over And Out** is a modpack designed for creative builders and transit enthusiasts who want to explore the power of **addons for the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR)** mod. Built on the beta release of **MTR 4.0.0** (not 3.2.2), this pack expands your possibilities with a rich selection of community-created extensions. From the classic systems of London and Russia to sleek modern lines and immersive decorations, *Over And Out* lets you raise the bar on what's possible in Minecraft transit design. Think you can build this? ![Can you make this?](https://metromapmaker.com/static/media/images/247/AYn0Fmrc.svg) --- ## 📦 Included Mods | Mod Name | Version & Notes | | ----------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | | **Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR)** | `4.0.0-prerelease.1` – core of the modpack | | **MTR: Station Decoration** | `4.0.0-prerelease.1-1.3.18` – decorative blocks & props | | **MTR: London Underground Addon** | `2.2.3+1.18.2` – signage, textures, and aesthetics | | **MTR: London Underground Trains** | `1.0.2` – LU rolling stock | | **MTR: Russian Metro Addon** | `4.0.0-2.0.0-beta-4` – Russian-inspired content | | **MTR: Renfe Addon** | `0.2` – Spanish trains | | **Tianjin Metro** | `1.0.0-beta-4` – China-based metro elements | | **British Transport Addon** | `1.0.0-alpha.9` – UK metro visuals | | **Joban Client Mod** | `2.0.0-beta.13` – utility mod for functionality | | **Geckolib** | `3.0.80` – animation library dependency | | **Filters API** | `1.0.0+1.18.2` – required for compatibility | | **Fabric API** | `0.77.0+1.18.2` – core dependency | | **Fabric Language Kotlin** | `1.13.3+kotlin.2.1.20` – Kotlin support | | **Architectury API** | `4.12.94+fabric` – multi-platform support | --- ## 🔧 Requirements * Minecraft 1.18.2 * Fabric Loader * Adequate system for running animation-heavy builds --- ## ℹ️ Summary *MTR: Over And Out* is a modpack designed for the use of **addons to the MTR mod**. This modpack uses **MTR version 4.0.0 (beta)** and **does not support 3.2.2**. It’s a showcase of what’s possible when the community builds on top of a great foundation—**raise yourself** and take your transit projects to the next level. --- This description is generated by AI.
For Modrinth staff reviewing this: I do not bear the creativity or fantasy to make a fancy description like Simply Optimized or Aged. But I must say, they're impressing!
